title: Melody's Trailer Recreation
description:
A recreation I made of minecraft's trailers!

this is NOT built off of any other modpack and every mod was picked by yours truly during an afternoon
body:
![Melody's Trailer Receation!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca8df36ba36b743e67c27b9f10cf24f80057af23.png)

This Modpack aims to bring some much needed life to minecraft utilizing the trailers look. 
Each mods setting was carefully adjusted to match the trailerss as closley as possible yet still be at a playable framerate (this goal may result for some mods to be removed in the future)

This Modpack will update with minecraft as it goes on, making some sacrifices in order to keep it up to date. fear not though! as previous versions are always avaliable at the "Versions" Tab!
Speaking of versions, I will try to backport the modpack to the earliest version I can since some people prefer those versions, I wont go below 1.14 though as that is the update that (to my knowledge) Introduced the trailer look.
